Just now

--

Photo by Mathew Schwartz on UnsplashSub-tittel:No laptop,No wifi.just a 4G phone and these apps.
I live in banisanta,Khulna.
I do not have a laptop.I do not have a desk.My offline is my phone.And I still earn online.
How? with free Al tools. Here are the 5 apps I use every single day. All of them are free on Android.
what I use it for: Ideas, outlines Grammar.
Example: I type: Give me 5 story ideas about village life in Bangladesh.
In 10 seconds, I have 5 tittes.I never copy the answer.I use it like a friend who give me ideas.
cost:$0.Free.
Grammarly keyboard my English teacher
What I use it for: Fixing grammar while I type on medium.
Example: I write I am from banisanta, Grammarly will say I am from dacope.
Payoneer- My bank what I use it for: Getting paid from Medium.
Example: Medium dose not send money to Bangladesh banks. So I use payoneer. It gives me a free us bank account. Medium second dollars there. Then I send it to my bkash.
Cost: $0 to open.
That is how you stay safe on Medium.
